case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. RANDALL ZAMARRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMARRA, RANDALL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75.00) SERVED DEC-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMARRA, RANDALL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMARRA, RANDALL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMARRA, RANDALL
